query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as invalidos
FROM establishments 
WHERE status = 'pending' 
  AND address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' 
  AND address NOT REGEXP '^(Rua|Avenida|Alameda|Praça|Travessa|Largo|Estrada|Rodovia|Viela|Beco|Viaduto|Passagem|Vila|Ladeira|Parque|Ponte|Marginal|Acesso) ';
